root.name: Slide 4 Table Creation and Content Accuracy
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly created a table with the required structure and populated it with the correct data on Slide 4.

children.name: Table Structure on Slide 4
children.description: Checks if a table exists on Slide 4, and if it has exactly 2 columns with the required headers.

children.name: Table Presence on Slide 4
children.description: Verifies that a table exists on Slide 4.

children.name: Table has 2 Columns
children.description: Checks that the table on Slide 4 has exactly 2 columns.

children.name: Table Headers Correct
children.description: Checks that the table headers are 'Application' and 'Architecture Type'.

children.name: Table Content Accuracy
children.description: Checks that 'Skype' and 'Instant messaging' appear correctly under the 'Application' column and that their corresponding 'Architecture Type' cells are not empty.

children.name: Skype Entry in Table
children.description: Checks that 'Skype' is present in the 'Application' column of the table on Slide 4.

children.name: Instant Messaging Entry in Table
children.description: Checks that 'Instant messaging' is present in the 'Application' column of the table on Slide 4.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or features
children.description: Checks that no unrelated changes were made to slides other than slide 4, or to slide 4's animations/transitions or other features.

children.name: No extraneous text/font changes on other slides
children.description: Checks that text and font properties on slides other than slide 4 were not changed.

children.name: No extraneous changes to animations or transitions on any slide
children.description: Checks that no animation or transition was added, removed, or modified in the presentation.

children.name: No extraneous slides added or removed
children.description: Checks that no slides were added or removed in the presentation.

metadata.task: Slide 4: Create a simple table with two columns: 'Application' and 'Architecture Type' and insert Skype and Instant messaging
